message:
test(labruntime): port 33 webhook/secrets/reports tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port async tests from three modules to asupersync-based RuntimeFixture:
- webhook.rs: 12 tests (dispatcher + pipeline integration)
- secrets.rs: 11 tests (storage scan, incremental, pane filter, e2e)
- reports.rs: 10 tests (session report generation, redaction, filtering)

All 33 tests pass with --features asupersync-runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
